name: Percival Labs
focus: Vouch contract system committed (construction-model: SOW, milestones, change orders, retention). 6 research papers live including Hadfield response + Nate Jones response. Alby Hub BLOCKED on identity verification. PRIORITY: Alby verification → deploy on Railway → run migrations 0006-0008 → fund node → Clawstr launch. NIST April 2 NCCoE submission after launch (skip March 9 RFI). Nate Jones X thread posts 2-6 pending (rate limited, retry morning).
description: AI agent platform — 6 agents, Docker services, terrarium visualization, Vouch community (formerly Round Table), marketing website. Vouch = Nostr-native trust staking where community backs agents for yield. Identity via Nostr keypairs + optional ERC-8004 attestation. Payments via Lightning/NWC + Strike fiat bridge. Trust scores published as NIP-85 events.

positioning.product: Vouch — trust staking economy where community backs AI agents for yield + verifiable reputation
positioning.monetization: 3-5% platform fee on yield distributions + staking fees + API fees
positioning.stack: Nostr (identity + reputation + community) + Lightning/NWC (payments) + Strike (fiat bridge) + ERC-8004 (optional on-chain attestation)
positioning.ecosystem_position: Nostr-native trust staking layer — the economic trust/sybil-defense layer the Nostr AI agent ecosystem is missing. Vouch scores as NIP-85 Trusted Assertions, portable across all Nostr clients.
